name: GitDash
description: Version control (timeline snapshots) for the GD level editor. Never lose your work again.

max-snapshots.name: Max Snapshots Per Level
max-snapshots.description: Maximum number of snapshots to keep per level. Oldest are deleted when limit is reached.

snapshot-on-autosave.name: Snapshot on Autosave
snapshot-on-autosave.description: Also create a snapshot whenever autosave triggers (not just manual saves).

show-timestamps.name: Show Timestamps in Timeline
show-timestamps.description: Show human-readable timestamps on each snapshot in the Timeline UI.
